case_title: YUAN GUANG ZHENG VS. THOMAS GLEN MOTTRAM

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY ZHENG, YUAN GUANG AS TO DEFENDANT MOTTRAM, THOMAS GLEN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-13-2011 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED SEP-20-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MOTTRAM, THOMAS GLEN

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-13-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-13-2011 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: DEBORAH DANILOFF. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. ALEX AHENG INTERPRETS ENGLISH/CANTONESE - CANTONESE/ENGLISH ON PLAINTIFF'S BEHALF. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM DEBORAH DANILOFF FILED BY ZHENG, YUAN GUANG MOTTRAM, THOMAS GLEN
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-13-2011 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ZHENG, YUAN GUANG RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MOTTRAM, THOMAS GLEN $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $500.00 INTEREST, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,585.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT MOTTRAM, THOMAS GLEN
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JAN-03-2012 ORDERED DESTROYED
